title: The Vampire Doll
original_title: 幽霊屋敷の恐怖 血を吸う人形
overview: A young man goes missing after visiting his girlfriend's isolated country home. His sister and her boyfriend trace him to the creepy mansion, but their search becomes perilous when they uncover a gruesome family history.
